recent_user_directives: The full 24B corpus estimate is too large for the available drives.
A 9B model may be necessary and the labels should make the size tiers much clearer.
recent_assistant_responses: The panel currently uses a pretraining-scale assumption and should separate minimum tuning size from full corpus ambition.
A 9B model would bring the full target down to about 670.55 GB and the minimum tuning threshold to about 3.35 GB.

notes: This iteration preserves a practical storage-budget correction and a possible target-model pivot from 24B to 9B.
